test-method.name: TC46 - Verify user search works correctly with partial match values

exception.message: Given open the browser and enter the Url....................................passed And login as tenant admin...................................................passed When navigate to organization and click on users tab........................passed And click on create a user button...........................................passed And enter user creation details for partial match search test...............passed When click on create button.................................................passed Then validate user created successfully.....................................passed When navigate to organization and click on users tab........................passed And search by partial login id and verify results are returned..............failed And click on logout.........................................................skipped Then validate login page is displayed.......................................skipped
exception.full-stacktrace: com.microsoft.playwright.PlaywrightException: Error { message='Error: strict mode violation: locator("//table[@id='usersListTable']//td[contains(normalize-space(),'harish142124278')]") resolved to 2 elements: 1) harish142124278 aka getByRole(AriaRole.GRIDCELL, new Page.GetByRoleOptions().setName("harish142124278")).first() 2) harish142124278 aka getByRole(AriaRole.GRIDCELL, new Page.GetByRoleOptions().setName("harish142124278")).nth(1) name='Error stack='Error:
